'''rozalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labiolateral|labiolateral]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-z-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labiolateral|labiolateral]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rozalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rozalithi|rozalithi]] || [[word:rozaliji|rozaliji]] || [[word:rozalishi|rozalishi]] || [[word:rozaliki|rozaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rozaluthuthu|rozaluthuthu]] || [[word:rozalujuju|rozalujuju]] || [[word:rozalushushu|rozalushushu]] || [[word:rozalukuku|rozalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rozaluthu|rozaluthu]] || [[word:rozaluju|rozaluju]] || [[word:rozalushu|rozalushu]] || [[word:rozaluku|rozaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rozalufthuf|rozalufthuf]] || [[word:rozalufjuf|rozalufjuf]] || [[word:rozalufshuf|rozalufshuf]] || [[word:rozalufkuf|rozalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rozalethe|rozalethe]] || [[word:rozaleje|rozaleje]] || [[word:rozaleshe|rozaleshe]] || [[word:rozaleke|rozaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rozalothotho|rozalothotho]] || [[word:rozalojojo|rozalojojo]] || [[word:rozaloshosho|rozaloshosho]] || [[word:rozalokoko|rozalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rozalotho|rozalotho]] || [[word:rozalojo|rozalojo]] || [[word:rozalosho|rozalosho]] || [[word:rozaloko|rozaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rozalofthof|rozalofthof]] || [[word:rozalofjof|rozalofjof]] || [[word:rozalofshof|rozalofshof]] || [[word:rozalofkof|rozalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rozalĂŻfthĂŻf|rozalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rozalĂŻfjĂŻf|rozalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rozalĂŻfshĂŻf|rozalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rozalĂŻfkĂŻf|rozalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rozalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|rozalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rozalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|rozalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rozalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|rozalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rozalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|rozalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rozalĂŻfthĂŻf|rozalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rozalĂŻfjĂŻf|rozalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rozalĂŻfshĂŻf|rozalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rozalĂŻfkĂŻf|rozalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rozalĂŻfthĂŻf|rozalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rozalĂŻfjĂŻf|rozalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rozalĂŻfshĂŻf|rozalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rozalĂŻfkĂŻf|rozalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rozalĂŠthĂŠ|rozalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:rozalĂŠjĂŠ|rozalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:rozalĂŠshĂŠ|rozalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:rozalĂŠkĂŠ|rozalĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rozalathatha|rozalathatha]] || [[word:rozalajaja|rozalajaja]] || [[word:rozalashasha|rozalashasha]] || [[word:rozalakaka|rozalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rozalatha|rozalatha]] || [[word:rozalaja|rozalaja]] || [[word:rozalasha|rozalasha]] || [[word:rozalaka|rozalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rozalafthaf|rozalafthaf]] || [[word:rozalafjaf|rozalafjaf]] || [[word:rozalafshaf|rozalafshaf]] || [[word:rozalafkaf|rozalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rozalasha|rozalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rozalshĂ«sha|rozalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rozalrosha|rozalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rozalmusha|rozalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rozalyasha|rozalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorozalnkshĂ«sha|gorozalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorozalnkrosha|gorozalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorozalnkmusha|gorozalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorozalnkyasha|gorozalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rozazalasha|rozazalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rozazalshĂ«sha|rozazalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rozazalrosha|rozazalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rozazalmusha|rozazalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rozazalyasha|rozazalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorozazalnkshĂ«sha|gorozazalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorozazalnkrosha|gorozazalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorozazalnkmusha|gorozazalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorozazalnkyasha|gorozazalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:rezĂŠlasha|rezĂŠlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rezĂŠlshĂ«sha|rezĂŠlshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rezĂŠlrosha|rezĂŠlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rezĂŠlmusha|rezĂŠlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rezĂŠlyasha|rezĂŠlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorezĂŠlnkshĂ«sha|gorezĂŠlnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorezĂŠlnkrosha|gorezĂŠlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorezĂŠlnkmusha|gorezĂŠlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorezĂŠlnkyasha|gorezĂŠlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rozfalasha|rozfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rozfalshĂ«sha|rozfalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rozfalrosha|rozfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rozfalmusha|rozfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rozfalyasha|rozfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorozfalnkshĂ«sha|gorozfalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorozfalnkrosha|gorozfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorozfalnkmusha|gorozfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorozfalnkyasha|gorozfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
